title: CAST('-' AS NUMERIC) computes 0.0
description:
mrigger added on 2019-05-25 10:06:10:
Consider the following example:
SELECT CAST('-' AS NUMERIC); -- unexpected: computes 0.0
I would expect that 0 is computed by the expression, as, for example, in the expressions below:
SELECT CAST('-0' AS NUMERIC); -- 0
SELECT CAST('+' AS NUMERIC); -- 0
SELECT CAST('/' AS NUMERIC); -- 0
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String NOT NULL);
SELECT id, toFloat64(value) AS numeric_value FROM test_table;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE toFloat64(value) IS NULL;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE toFloat64(value) = 0.0;
key_bug_features: CAST of negative string computes unexpected numeric value
